Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.bungee

Class VotingPluginBungee

java.lang.Object
net.md_5.bungee.api.plugin.Plugin
com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.bungee.VotingPluginBungee
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.md_5.bungee.api.plugin.Listener
public class VotingPluginBungee extends net.md_5.bungee.api.plugin.Plugin implements net.md_5.bungee.api.plugin.Listener
VotingPlugin proxy implementation for BungeeCord. Supports a true hot reload (no proxy restart required) by:
  • Stopping the old VotingPluginProxy runtime
  • Reloading configuration
  • Re-registering the plugin message channel if it changed
  • Creating a fresh VotingPluginProxy instance (constructor-time state refreshed)
  • Re-initializing caches and rescheduling tasks

      Parameters:
      ev - plugin message event

    • reloadPlugin

      public void reloadPlugin(boolean loadMysql)
      Hot-reloads the proxy runtime.

      Two modes:

      • Soft reload (loadMysql=false): keeps the existing VotingPluginProxy instance (and its MySQL pool) alive. Only reloads config/channel and applies runtime-only changes via VotingPluginProxy.reload().
      • Full reload (loadMysql=true): fully tears down the old runtime (including MySQL), recreates the proxy instance, reconnects MySQL from config, then calls VotingPluginProxy.load(com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.cache.IVoteCache, com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.cache.nonvoted.INonVotedPlayersStorage).
      Parameters:
      loadMysql - true to fully reinitialize MySQL and rebuild the proxy runtime, false for a config/runtime-only reload

    • getMysqlConfig

      public com.bencodez.simpleapi.sql.mysql.config.MysqlConfig getMysqlConfig()
      Gets the MySQL configuration for Bungee.

      Prefers the "Database" section if it exists and contains keys; otherwise falls back to legacy root keys.

      Returns:
      mysql config (never null)

    • getGlobalDataMysqlConfig

      public com.bencodez.simpleapi.sql.mysql.config.MysqlConfig getGlobalDataMysqlConfig()
